## Project Context

All project context is documented in /ai-docs/:

- PROJECT.md → architecture, business logic, data flow
- STACK.md → tech stack, folder structure, conventions
- PROGRESS.md → history of problems solved and decisions made
- TASKS.md → current state and next steps

## Rules for every session

1. Start by reading /ai-docs/ — this is your memory.
2. Do NOT scan the full codebase unless a specific file is needed.
3. After completing any task, append to PROGRESS.md (never rewrite it).
4. Keep TASKS.md updated with current state.
5. Never ask me to re-explain the project.
